creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
Hi, I had an issue getting this port put into place
Please let me know if there is any specific required info needed to help track this down.  It appears to possibly be a bug with the uninstall script not removing certain pieces?

Kind Regards,
Jason



# make reinstall
